headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “True story: 4 years ago both my cats and my (at the time) 3 year old came in the bathroom with me while my (at the time) 9 year old ate my cupcake because he thought no one claimed it."
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Opinion: Obviously, it's the dogs fault... (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Different generations of cat
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-10)
